title: Tencent Adjusts AI Organizational Structure: QClaw Team Merged into Cloud Product Department Six and Deeply Integrated with WorkBuddy
excerpt: On July 20, Tencent released an internal organizational adjustment notice, transferring the relevant business and some teams of the QClaw Product Center to the
content_html:
On July 20, Tencent released an internal organizational adjustment notice, transferring the relevant business and some teams of the QClaw Product Center to the Cloud Product Department 6. The reorganized QClaw product will continue to operate smoothly. This adjustment marks that Tencent's strategic layout in the AI Agent (intelligent agent) field has entered a new stage of intensification and deep integration.

As a core exploration in Tencent's AI office field, QClaw was developed by the Tencent Computer Manager team based on the OpenClaw underlying architecture. Since its internal testing started in March this year, it quickly became popular, with user numbers exceeding millions within the first week of launch. The department that now takes over this business, Cloud Product Department 6, is the parent department of another phenomenon-level AI office intelligent agent, WorkBuddy.

The latest "Market Insight Report on China's Office Intelligent Agent Platforms in Q2 2026" released by Analysys Intelligence shows that Tencent WorkBuddy has emerged as a strong player with powerful AI-native office capabilities. In June this year, its monthly visit volume in the domestic PC-based AI-native office intelligent agent market exceeded 20 million, continuously holding the top position in the market, and its monthly visit volume surpassed the combined total of the second and third place in the industry.

Against the backdrop of AI intelligent agents moving from early functional exploration to large-scale application, Tencent's consolidation of the QClaw and WorkBuddy teams helps reduce internal resource dispersion and form a collaborative force in technology and scenarios. This organizational restructuring not only strengthens Tencent's leading position in the PC-based AI-native office market but also provides an industry reference for tech giants to integrate intelligent agent product matrices during the stage of large model application deployment.

sentences.en: On July 20, Tencent released an internal organizational adjustment notice, transferring the relevant business and some teams of the QClaw Product Center to the Cloud Product Department 6.
sentences.zh: 7月20日，腾讯发布内部组织调整通知，将QClaw产品中心相关业务及部分团队划入云产品六部。

sentences.en: The reorganized QClaw product will continue to operate smoothly.
sentences.zh: 重组后的QClaw产品将继续平稳运行。

sentences.en: This adjustment marks that Tencent's strategic layout in the AI Agent (intelligent agent) field has entered a new stage of intensification and deep integration.
sentences.zh: 此次调整标志着腾讯在AI Agent（智能代理）领域的战略布局进入了集约化、深度融合的新阶段。

sentences.zh: 在AI智能体从早期功能探索走向大规模应用的背景下，腾讯对QClaw和WorkBuddy团队的整合，有助于减少内部资源分散，形成技术和场景的协同力量。

sentences.en: This organizational restructuring not only strengthens Tencent's leading position in the PC-based AI-native office market but also provides an industry reference for tech giants to integrate intelligent agent product matrices during the stage of large model application deployment.
sentences.zh: 此次组织架构调整不仅巩固了腾讯在PC端人工智能原生办公市场的领先地位，也为科技巨头在大模型应用部署阶段整合智能坐席产品矩阵提供了行业参考。

content_html_zh:
7月20日，腾讯发布内部组织调整通知，将QClaw产品中心相关业务及部分团队划入云产品六部。 重组后的QClaw产品将继续平稳运行。 此次调整标志着腾讯在AI Agent（智能代理）领域的战略布局进入了集约化、深度融合的新阶段。

作为腾讯AI办公领域的核心探索，QClaw由腾讯电脑管家团队基于OpenClaw底层架构开发。 自今年3月开始内测以来，迅速火爆，上线首周用户数突破百万。 现在接手这项业务的部门——云产品六部，是另一款现象级AI办公智能代理——WorkBuddy的上级部门。

易观智库最新发布的《2026年第二季度中国办公智能代理平台市场洞察报告》显示，腾讯WorkBuddy凭借强大的AI原生办公能力，已成为强势玩家。 今年6月，其在国内PC端AI原生办公智能座席市场月访问量突破2000万，持续稳居市场第一，月访问量超过行业第二名和第三名的总和。

在AI智能体从早期功能探索走向大规模应用的背景下，腾讯对QClaw和WorkBuddy团队的整合，有助于减少内部资源分散，形成技术和场景的协同力量。 此次组织架构调整不仅巩固了腾讯在PC端人工智能原生办公市场的领先地位，也为科技巨头在大模型应用部署阶段整合智能坐席产品矩阵提供了行业参考。
